scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.deploy:preview: npm run check && npx netlify-cli deploy --site 1c2e4465-5142-49a4-b348-6cac39eea40f --dir=dist --no-build
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run check && npx netlify-cli deploy --prod --site 1c2e4465-5142-49a4-b348-6cac39eea40f --dir=dist --no-build
